markets.no_sub_title: Xander Schauffele beats Matsuyama and McIlroy
markets.rules_primary: If Xander Schauffele is determined to have won the 3-ball matchup among Xander Schauffele, Hideki Matsuyama, and Rory McIlroy in the 1st round of the 2026 THE PLAYERS Championship, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Tie Resolution

If multiple participants are tied for the 3-ball lead at the end of the round:

Yes payout: $1/N, rounded down to the nearest cent (N = number of tied participants)
No payout: $1 minus the Yes payout

Withdrawal Rule

If a golfer withdraws prior to teeing off, all markets will resolve to fair market value.
